title: Active Lane Holo Board
summary: Added a state-driven holo board inside every mounted lane stage, turning level, XP, gates, active work, and trail depth into animated sockets with a runner overlay.
proof: Rendered holo board nodes from lane counts, level, progress, gates, active work, and trail depth.
Added compact sticky stage-board CSS with a moving runner and wake animation that does not add a new scroll section.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the unlock.
